en_title: Gears of War: E-Day Is Xbox Console Exclusive, Release Date Revealed
cn_title: 《战争机器：事变日》10月6日发售，Xbox独占确认
subtitle: 兽族归来
opus_summary: 《战争机器：事变日》确认2026年10月6日发售，Xbox主机独占，不登陆PS5。游戏采用Unreal Engine 5，讲述事变日马库斯与多姆在卡洛纳城对抗兽族的故事。

paragraphs.en: Gears of War: E-Day kicked off the Xbox Games Showcase 2026 with a first look at gameplay, a release date of October 6, 2026, and confirmation that it will be an Xbox console exclusive.
paragraphs.cn: 《战争机器：事变日》在2026年Xbox游戏展示会上首次公开实机演示，确认将于2026年10月6日发售，并明确为Xbox主机独占作品。

paragraphs.en: Our first look at The Coalition’s Gears prequel game follows an armorless (and more mobile) Marcus Fenix as he shoots through the streets of a city on Sera as Emergeance Day kicks off. Regular civilians can be seen being torn apart as the Locust horde makes its grand, gory debut. Xbox CEO Asha Sharma then followed the presentation to confirm that this next game will not come to PS5.
paragraphs.cn: 我们首次看到The Coalition开发的《战争机器》前传作品：事变日爆发之际，未穿盔甲（且更加灵活）的马库斯·菲尼克斯在塞拉星球的城市街道上射击。兽族大军血腥登场，普通平民被撕碎的画面触目惊心。Xbox CEO阿莎·夏尔玛随后在发布会上确认，这款新作不会登陆PS5。

paragraphs.en: While it’s nice to see Gears of War: E-Day give players that October release date, PlayStation fans may be torn to hear that it will only launch for Xbox when it comes to its console presence. You can see that first gameplay trailer below.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然《战争机器：事变日》确定10月发售令人欣喜，但PlayStation玩家听到它仅登陆Xbox平台时可能会感到纠结。以下是首支实机预告片。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft's promise to keep Gears of War: E-Day off of competing consoles may come as a surprise, but the above footage was anything but. This is a third-person prequel that already looks like it fits right in with the rest of The Coalition's gritty franchise, as Marcus and Dom can be seen blasting, stabbing, and cutting through Grubs from any cover they can find. The biggest gameplay change so far seems to be how players can move, as Dom can be seen quickly climbing and leaping over small gaps and sliding to safety.
paragraphs.cn: 微软承诺不让《战争机器：事变日》登陆竞争对手主机或许令人意外，但上述实机演示却毫不意外。这款第三人称前传看起来与The Coalition打造的硬核系列一脉相承，马库斯和多姆利用一切掩体对兽族进行射击、刺杀和切割。目前最大的玩法变化似乎是角色的移动方式——多姆可以快速攀爬、跃过小缝隙并滑行至安全地带。

paragraphs.en: The Gears of War: E-Day gameplay reveal was almost immediately followed by its own dedicated Direct presentation, where The Coalition brought fans behind the scenes to talk more about how the latest entry returns to the series' roots. Set before the original Gears of War and built with Unreal Engine 5, the story follows Marcus and Dom in the city of Kalona. Just as the veteran duo begins to readjust to life while grieving the loss of Dom's older brother, Carlos, demons sprout from the earth, kicking off the series' infamous Emergeance Day. Its campaign can be played alone, with a second player via two-player splitscreen, or with up to four players in online co-op.
paragraphs.cn: 《战争机器：事变日》的实机演示之后，几乎立即举行了专属的Direct发布会。The Coalition带领粉丝深入幕后，详细介绍了这款最新作品如何回归系列本源。故事设定在初代《战争机器》之前，采用Unreal Engine 5打造，讲述马库斯和多姆在卡洛纳城的经历。当这对老兵搭档正因多姆的哥哥卡洛斯之死而悲伤、试图重新适应生活时，恶魔从地底涌出，拉开了系列中臭名昭著的“事变日”序幕。战役模式支持单人游玩、双人分屏合作，或最多四人在线合作。

paragraphs.en: The direct also dived into how the team built every street and building in what they called "the largest, most complex location" in Gears history, but it also talked about how that city will fall apart before players' eyes. The campaign is one cog in the machine that is the Gears of War franchise, but E-Day will have its own take on multiplayer, too. In an Xbox Wire post, The Coalition confirmed that 4v4 Versus mode is back. There's also Horde Siege, a 12-player PvE mode that sees three squads group up to fight off Locust across Kalona in large city maps.
paragraphs.cn: 发布会还深入介绍了团队如何打造他们称之为《战争机器》史上“最大、最复杂的地点”的每一条街道和每一栋建筑，同时也讲述了这座城市如何在玩家眼前分崩离析。战役模式是《战争机器》系列这台机器中的一个齿轮，但《事变日》也有自己的多人模式。在Xbox Wire的一篇文章中，The Coalition确认4v4对抗模式回归。此外还有“部落围攻”——一种12人PVE模式，三个小队组队在大型城市地图中穿越卡洛纳，抵御兽族。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft has confirmed that Gears of War: E-Day is coming to PC via Xbox on PC and Steam, cloud, and Xbox Series X | S. The company has also said it will not bring it to PS5 at a later date.
paragraphs.cn: 微软已确认《战争机器：事变日》将通过Xbox on PC、Steam、云游戏以及Xbox Series X|S登陆PC平台。该公司还表示，未来也不会将其带到PS5。

paragraphs.en: An open beta will take place August 6, 2026, with players who pre-order their copy promised to receive early access. If you need to catch up on all of the biggest reveals, you can check out everything announced at the Xbox Games Showcase 2026 .
paragraphs.cn: 公开测试将于2026年8月6日开启，预购玩家将获得抢先体验资格。如果你想了解所有重大发布，可以查看2026年Xbox游戏展示会上公布的全部内容。
